languages.text: "Нет — жаль, что эти жертвы были принесены в угоду эгоизму и жадности, а не на благо Золотого Трона". {n}Хейнрикс окидывает вас взглядом.{/n} "Тогда бы этот ресурс был потрачен не зря".

traits.locale_text: "Нет — жаль, что эти жертвы были принесены в угоду эгоизму и жадности, а не на благо Золотого Трона". {n}Хейнрикс окидывает вас взглядом.{/n} "Тогда бы этот ресурс был потрачен не зря".
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."
languages.original_text: "Нет — жаль, что эти жертвы были принесены в угоду эгоизму и жадности, а не на благо Золотого Трона". {n}Хейнрикс окидывает вас взглядом.{/n} "Тогда бы этот ресурс был потрачен не зря".

traits.locale_text: "No — it is a shame these millions of people gave lives for her ego and greed and not for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "Otherwise this resource would not have been wasted."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "No — it is a shame these millions of people gave lives for her ego and greed and not for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "Otherwise this resource would not have been wasted."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

traits.locale_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."
traits.speaker: HeinrixCompanion

languages.text: "Nein — es ist eine Schande, dass Millionen von Menschen geopfert wurden, um ihrem Ego und ihrer Gier zu dienen, anstatt dem Wohl des Goldenen Throns." {n}Heinrix' Blick schweift über dich.{/n} "Das wäre eine würdige Verwendung der Ressource gewesen."
languages.original_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."

traits.locale_text: "Nein — es ist eine Schande, dass Millionen von Menschen geopfert wurden, um ihrem Ego und ihrer Gier zu dienen, anstatt dem Wohl des Goldenen Throns." {n}Heinrix' Blick schweift über dich.{/n} "Das wäre eine würdige Verwendung der Ressource gewesen."

languages.text: "Non, c'est une honte que des millions de personnes aient été sacrifiées pour servir son ego et sa cupidité plutôt que pour le bien du Trône d'Or. {n}Le regard d'Heinrix se pose sur vous.{/n} "Cela aurait été une bonne utilisation de la ressource."
languages.original_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."

traits.locale_text: "Non, c'est une honte que des millions de personnes aient été sacrifiées pour servir son ego et sa cupidité plutôt que pour le bien du Trône d'Or. {n}Le regard d'Heinrix se pose sur vous.{/n} "Cela aurait été une bonne utilisation de la ressource."

languages.text: "No — es una vergüenza que millones de personas fueran sacrificadas para servir a su ego y codicia en lugar de por el bien del Trono Dorado". {n}La mirada de Heinrix te recorre.{/n} "Eso habría sido un uso digno de los recursos".
languages.original_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."

traits.locale_text: "No — es una vergüenza que millones de personas fueran sacrificadas para servir a su ego y codicia en lugar de por el bien del Trono Dorado". {n}La mirada de Heinrix te recorre.{/n} "Eso habría sido un uso digno de los recursos".

languages.text: "Hayır — milyonlarca insanın Altın Taht'ın iyiliği yerine onun egosuna ve açgözlülüğüne hizmet etmek için feda edilmiş olması utanç verici." {n}Heinrix'in bakışları üzerinizde geziniyor.{/n} "Bu, kaynakların değerli bir kullanımı olabilirdi."
languages.original_text: "No — it is a shame that millions of people were sacrificed to serve her ego and greed rather for the good of the Golden Throne." {n}Heinrix's gaze sweeps over you.{/n} "That would have been a worthy use of the resource."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır — milyonlarca insanın Altın Taht'ın iyiliği yerine onun egosuna ve açgözlülüğüne hizmet etmek için feda edilmiş olması utanç verici." {n}Heinrix'in bakışları üzerinizde geziniyor.{/n} "Bu, kaynakların değerli bir kullanımı olabilirdi."
